case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ELMER CASTRO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.50) SERVED MAY-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ELMER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-18-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE 3 MONTHS FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT, AND THEREAFTER FOR A TOTAL OF 12 MONTHS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ELMER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. MOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ELMER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF, SERVED JUL-11-10 BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.97) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ELMER
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-10-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-22-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, ELMER $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,295.97, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
